title: Snug Beach Cabin & Caravan Tourist Park
description: Pared-back beachfront lodging offering no-frills cabins, a campsite & an RV park, plus BBQs.
hotelDescription:
A minute's walk from Snug Beach along North West Bay, this pared-back lodging is 6 km from Snug Falls, 7 km from Dru Point Bicentennial Park and less than a kilometre from the B68 road.
 The unfussy 1- to 2-bedroom cabins provide free Wi-Fi, sitting areas and satellite TVs, as well as en suite bathrooms, kitchens and dining areas. Some offer water views, verandahs, bunk beds and/or DVD players. Linens are provided.
 Amenities consist of a communal kitchen, BBQs and a TV lounge, plus coin-operated laundry facilities. There's also a campsite and an RV park.

title: Swansea Holiday Park
description: Old-school private cabins with full kitchens, plus a playground and a BBQ area.
hotelDescription:
A 3-minute walk from the beach, these laid-back holiday cabins are also a 9-minute walk from Swansea town centre.
 Private, no-nonsense cabins have separate bedrooms, en suite bathrooms and full kitchens. Some have patios and minimum stay rules may apply. Wi-Fi is available for a fee.
 There's a children's playground. Other amenities include BBQ areas and a shared kitchen. Laundry facilities are available for a fee and there's also a campsite.

title: BIG4 Tassie Getaway Parks St Helens
description: Casual cabins & a 24-bed bunkhouse in a relaxed resort with a game room, a TV lounge & a BBQ area.
address: 2 Penelope St, St Helens TAS 7216, Australia
hotelDescription:
This relaxed resort on the edge of town is a 13-minute walk from Kings Park on Beauty Bay and a 7-minute walk from the A3 highway.
 The casual cabins have flat-screen TVs, kitchenettes, and shower-only en suite bathrooms. They sleep up to 6 people. Upgraded cabins add full kitchens, tubs, and decks or balconies with outdoor seating. There's also a bunkhouse with 12 bedrooms, and shared bathrooms and outdoor kitchen facilities.
 Parking is included for some cabin types. There's a jumping pillow, a game room, a TV room and a playground, plus a BBQ area, a shared kitchen and a fire pit. There are also laundry facilities. Campsites are available.
